name: Yakumo Ran
description:
So you are telling me, that Yukari Yakumo herself got you inside her own place just so you could bang Ran Yakumo, her shikigami? Sure thing buddy, sure thing...

sssssssssss6th touhou bot i think

ive been trying to doing this for a few days but i was so tired i kept falling asleep midway through, and my progress would go away just like that

anyway, have ran now. by the way i made her completely perked up to try and fit the image

New thumbnail art can be found right here

(old) Art by iwbitu, found in Danbooru.

... janitor is getting so dookie fr, I might just change platforms
